properties.name: coastal_analysis_zone
properties.source: Local approximation of Copernicus Coastal Zones 2018 (ADR-018).
properties.rationale: Wider than the Copernicus 10 km inland extent because Natural Earth 1:10m ocean is too coarse to represent estuaries and tidal waterways (e.g. the Dutch polder is ~24 km from the NE ocean edge even at Rotterdam). 25 km is the smallest buffer that correctly includes Amsterdam and Rotterdam while keeping Utrecht (~50 km from ocean) and all inland capitals out of scope.
properties.note: Canonical Copernicus Coastal Zones 2018 (EEA login required) should replace this file when available.
